info.title: Riverside.Elapsed.CommandLine
info.description: "Elapsed" is a .NET wrapper and cross-platform application for Lapse, Hackclub's timelapse tracking tool

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Elapsed CLI for Lapse (Hack Club's timelapse API)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --base-url
options.description: Lapse API base URL.

options.name: --token
options.description: Bearer token for authenticated endpoints.

options.name: --token-file
options.description: Path to a file containing a bearer token.

commands.name: set-token
commands.description: Persist a bearer token for future runs.

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Authenticate online to get a bearer token.

commands.name: list-operations
commands.description: List all generated API operations that are available.

options.name: --query
options.description: Query value as key=value. Repeat for multiple values.

options.name: --body-json
options.description: Inline JSON request body.

options.name: --body-file
options.description: Path to JSON file containing request body.
